title: Corteva 2024 Annual Report
note: Primary financial and segment source for Corteva's Seed and Crop Protection businesses, 2024 net sales, EBITDA, and net income.

title: Seeds & Traits
note: Official product page describing Corteva seed and trait offerings, including Pioneer and Enlist-related seed technologies.

title: Products and Solutions
note: Official product navigation source for Corteva's seed, crop protection, and agricultural solution categories.

title: Corteva Statistics & Valuation
note: Market-data source used for current market capitalization and trailing P/E inputs.

title: OSSI Varieties
note: Catalog source showing the existence of OSSI-pledged seed varieties.

title: Open Source Seed Initiative Variety Designation Agreement
note: Documents the pledge-based mechanism for keeping designated seed varieties open for downstream use and breeding.

title: OpenTEAM
note: Primary source for OpenTEAM's farmer-led, interoperable, open agricultural technology ecosystem.

title: OpenTEAM Ecosystem Overview
note: Technical overview describing OpenTEAM's role as convenor, facilitator, and steward for open agricultural technology infrastructure.

title: farmOS
note: Primary project source for the free and open-source farm management, planning, mapping, and recordkeeping platform.

title: farmOS GitHub Organization
note: Repository source for farmOS code and project implementation details.
